creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
The only patch related to "Schiit" I can find in the Linux sources is this:
https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/22390ce786c59328ccd13c329959dee1e8757487

But I don't think that's what we're missing here. Since the device attaches properly, and buffers and channels are set up without problems, the issue we have to narrow down is why the samples do not reach the audio device.

Can you boot with hw.usb.debug=15 and share dmesg?
